## Pine Parity Checklist

For feature-parity PRs, mark non-applicable items as N/A.

- [ ] Started from latest `master`.
- [ ] Parser fixture added or updated for syntax/grammar changes.
- [ ] Runtime fixture added or updated over deterministic local bars.
- [ ] Reduced Pine idiom checkpoint added when the behavior mirrors official docs or common public patterns.
- [ ] Negative diagnostic fixture added or updated for unsupported/invalid forms.
- [ ] `PINE_COMPATIBILITY_INVENTORY.md` updated for status, evidence, or remaining gaps.
- [ ] `PINE_COMPATIBILITY.md` narrative notes updated when user-facing behavior changed.
- [ ] Roadmap updated when an epic phase completed or scope changed.

## Verification

- [ ] `yarn typecheck`
- [ ] `yarn lint`
- [ ] `yarn test`
